market_session: BOJ Monetary Policy Meeting decision; new guideline effective 2026-06-17

calculation.method: official BOJ statement; prior guideline inferred from the 25 bp increase described by AP

text: The Bank of Japan decided on June 16, 2026 to encourage the uncollateralized overnight call rate to remain at around 1.0%, with the new guideline effective June 17, 2026.
The BOJ policy-board decision to change the money-market-operations guideline was approved by a 7-1 majority vote.

market_session: Trading Economics June 16, 2026 Chinese yuan market-data page
text: Trading Economics said the offshore yuan slipped around 6.76 per dollar as investors weighed mixed China data, including sustained home-price weakness, weaker fixed-asset investment, and an unexpected retail-sales decline.

calculation.method: AP reported Brent settlement and RTTNews reported intraday futures snapshot; both describe lower oil after U.S.-Iran deal optimism

text: AP reported Brent crude settled at $78.96 after a 5.1% drop, while RTTNews reported Brent futures at $79.68, down 4.20%, as U.S.-Iran deal optimism reduced the oil risk premium.
